name: Aebi Schmidt Holding AG
summary: Part I Aebi Schmidt Holdings AG is a leading global manufacturer of specialty vehicles. We are headquartered in Switzerland and employ around 5,700 people. We operate in 17 countries through our own sales and service organizations, with more than 70 locations worldwide, including over a dozen production facilities and a dense network of upfitting and service centers. Through established partnerships with dealers, we are represented in more than 90 additional countries globally. Our core offering...
